author: jus4
content: Result: Cannot reproduce GH#560. Test test_help_section_spacing_consistent added to tests/cli_integration.rs checks all 10 subcommands (root, issue, session, kickoff, config, init, swarm, sentinel, knowledge, integrity) and finds exactly 1 blank line between every adjacent pair of section headers in all cases. The test PASSES. The reported 'sometimes one blank line, sometimes two' between Commands: and Options: does not manifest on the current binary. The init/config verbose option layout was a potential red herring but does not affect inter-section spacing.
